vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual evidence. The pots contain no visible, healthy plant specimens. The environment appears to be a failed or dormant propagation setup.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No String of Nickels visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No Mexican Mint visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: No Pothos visible; White Rabbit anchor is present but isolated.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No Silver Guest visible.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains white rabbit figurine; soil is bare.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Pot: No distinct specimen identified; soil appears barren.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of fungal bloom or crusting.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of a metallic spoon (T-3) and a cylindrical object (T-1, T-4, Current) which are non-botanical interventions.

temporal_deltas.T_Earliest_to_T_minus_4: No significant change; pots remain barren.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_4_to_T_minus_3: Introduction of a metallic spoon in the yellow pot area.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_3_to_T_minus_2: Removal of the spoon; continued lack of vegetative growth.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_2_to_T_minus_1: Introduction of a cylindrical object (likely a sensor or marker) near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_Current: Static state; no growth or biological activity observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of photosynthesis or active plant life. The environment is strictly a soil-based substrate setup without active occupants.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the registered botanical specimens. The pots are currently serving as containers for soil and occasional non-botanical tools. The environment is stable but biologically inactive. No signs of germination or survival of the original registry plants are present.
